title: Contact Us
subtitle: We're here to help with customs clearance, transport, and warehousing across Europe.

hero.title: Let's Move Your Cargo
hero.description: Speak with our logistics specialists about customs clearance, inland transport, warehousing, and end-to-end supply chain support.

info.heading: How to Reach Us
info.subheading: Our team is ready to assist with shipments, compliance questions, and partnership inquiries.

form.heading: Send Us a Message
form.subheading: Complete the form below and our team will respond as soon as possible.
form.name: Full Name
form.subject: Subject
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your shipment, route, or logistics requirements...
form.success: Thank you for your message. Our logistics team will get back to you shortly.
form.submitError: We could not send your message. Please try again or contact us by phone.
form.errorSummary: Please correct the highlighted fields before submitting.

sidebar.inquiryText: Need urgent customs or transport support? Call our operations desk for faster assistance on active shipments.

shipment.title: Shipment coordination
shipment.desc: Import, export, and transit clearance at European ports and borders.

compliance.title: Compliance guidance
compliance.desc: Documentation, duties, and regulatory support for EU trade.

support.title: Dedicated specialists
support.desc: Personal account support for ongoing logistics partnerships.

map.title: European Operations Hub
map.iframeTitle: WINZ Logistics office location in Zele, Belgium

faq.heading: Common Questions
faq.subheading: Short answers before you reach out — visit our full FAQ for more detail.

customs.q: Which customs services do you provide?
customs.a: We handle import, export, and transit clearance across European seaports and border crossings, plus inland transport and warehousing.

quote.q: How do I request a quote?
quote.a: Submit the contact form with your route, cargo type, and timeline. Our team will prepare a tailored logistics proposal.

response.a: We aim to reply to business inquiries within one business day. Urgent shipment matters can be directed to our phone line.
